sigWerErrors.reason: 'luôn' (always) and 'lương' (salary) are completely different words and change the meaning of the sentence.
The insertion of 'rồi' (already/then) adds a temporal aspect but does not significantly change the overall meaning.
The insertion of 'cũng' (also) adds emphasis but does not change the main meaning.
Omitting 'luôn' (always) slightly reduces emphasis but does not derail the meaning.
